basic_details.job_title: Bramhapuri Forest Division Veterinary Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry with minimum 50% marks from recognized University, Registration with Maharashtra State Veterinary Council
qualification.details: Graduate with minimum of 50% aggregate marks from a recognized University in Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry. Registration with Maharashtra State Veterinary Council. Experience in handling wildlife veterinary activities and awareness programs in field areas. Higher education will be given preference. Computer operating knowledge must be essential.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Bramhapuri Forest Division Veterinary Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bramhapuri Forest Division Veterinary Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Bramhapuri Forest Division Veterinary Officer recruitment is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Veterinary Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry with at least 50% marks from a recognized university and be registered with the Maharashtra State Veterinary Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Veterinary Officer post is 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Veterinary Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 60,000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Bramhapuri Forest Division Veterinary Officer job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their application via email before the last date, 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Veterinary Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Does the recruitment mention any preference for higher education?
faq.answer: Yes, higher education will be given preference for the Veterinary Officer position.

faq.question: Q9. Is computer knowledge essential for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, computer operating knowledge is essential for the Veterinary Officer role.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity with the Bramhapuri Forest Division.
